Who I Am

About Me

I'm a passionate Computer Science & Engineering undergraduate at Manarat International University, currently in my 3rd semester with a strong CGPA of 3.87/4.00. My academic journey combines theoretical depth with practical problem-solving.

As a National Math Olympiad winner, I bring strong analytical thinking to everything I do — from competitive programming on CodeChef and Codeforces to building real-world GUI applications in Python.

I actively contribute to the community by producing educational content on YouTube, making complex concepts accessible. I've also participated in international poster competitions and IEEE sessions, reflecting my early commitment to research.

What I've Built

GitHub Projects

Python  ·  ⭐ Featured Project
🧮 Scientific Calculator

A full-featured scientific calculator built with Python Tkinter, featuring 30+ mathematical operations and an intuitive GUI with real-time calculation display and comprehensive error handling.

  • 30+ operations: trigonometric, logarithmic, and arithmetic functions
  • Intuitive GUI with real-time calculation display
  • Comprehensive error handling for edge cases
PythonTkinterMathGUI
